title: Xtra Smoky British Mentaiko Stir fry
description: A smoky and pillowy Yorkshire dish featuring mentaiko in a stir-fry, suitable for raw-friendly diets. This meal-prep recipe combines British flavors with Japanese mentaiko spice.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced smoked bacon and cook until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender.
Add the mentaiko to the skillet and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked bacon back into the skillet and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Serve the stir-fry over cooked yorkshire pudding.
Drizzle with soy sauce to taste.
